goal: Add @PreAuthorize RBAC to admin-only and internal controllers (config, audit, ledger, export)

tasks.name: Add spring-security dependency + @PreAuthorize to ConfigController and AuditController
tasks.action: Add <dependency><groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId><artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId></dependency> to sacco-config/pom.xml and sacco-audit/pom.xml. Add class-level @PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')") to ConfigController and AuditController. Import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize. Existing tests are @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension) so no test changes needed.

tasks.name: Add spring-security dependency + @PreAuthorize to LedgerController and fix LedgerControllerTest
tasks.action: Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency to sacco-ledger/pom.xml. Add class-level @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER')") to LedgerController. In LedgerControllerTest (@WebMvcTest): add @AutoConfigureMockMvc(addFilters = false) or @WithMockUser(roles = "ADMIN") to each test class/method so tests pass with security enabled.

tasks.name: Add @PreAuthorize to ExportController
tasks.action: Add class-level @PreAuthorize("hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER')") to ExportController. sacco-reporting already has spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server dependency. ExportControllerTest is @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension) so no test changes needed.

commitMessage: feat(auth-hardening): add RBAC to config, audit, ledger, and export controllers
